name: Sweet Pepper Pork
recipeIngredient: 4 center cut pork tenderloins, cut into 1-inch cubes
6 Ounces sweet peppers, diced or stripped (more or less to taste)
1 Packet pork flavoring (can use packet from Ramen noodles)
recipeInstructions:
1. In an electric wok or fry pan set to 275 degrees, add the oil and garlic.
2. After the garlic has started to turn golden brown, add the pork cubes, browning them thoroughly.
3. Add the soy sauce and smoke flavoring. Cook the meat in the sauce while simultaneously bringing water to a boil in a large saucepan.
4. In the boiling water, add the pork flavoring and bags of rice. Once the rice is cooked, stir it into the meat mixture and cover for 5 minutes.
5. Serve with a tossed salad.
